description: Design document session for OpenTeam agent orchestration framework
Phase 0 scaffolding - TypeScript monorepo with pnpm workspaces
Phase 1 - Agent Runtime: PTY management, idle detection, CLI adapters, AgentSimulator
Phase 2 - MCP server + SQLite persistence + event logger
Phase 3 - Web chat UI with PM via WebSocket
Phase 4 - Kanban board with live WebSocket updates
